title: Coronet University
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Coronet University''' was an educational institution in [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia's]] capital [[Coronet City/Legends|Coronet City]].

[[Tennet Sionaro|Dr. Tennet Sionaro]] was one of the teachers at the Archaeology Department of this university.

==Behind the scenes==
Coronet University is mentioned in a mission in [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']] called "Coronet Archaeology Site Menaced" that was available on Mission Terminals on Corellia.

[[The DarkStryder Campaign|''The Darkstryder Campaign'']] mentions the [[Corellia University/Legends|Corellia University]], but it is not known whether this is a completely different institution or maybe just another name for the same university.
